summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 7 warning, 11 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 test/parsers.test.mjs:1028 — Two integration tests are flaky (temp directory race condition); pass in isolation but fail intermittently in full suite. Add per-test subdirectory isolation.

🟡 bin/lib/parsers.mjs:1 — Module named `parsers.mjs` but SPEC says `validator-parsers.mjs`; export `parseProblemMatcher` vs SPEC's `parseGhaMatcher`. Task-11 explicitly checks for `validator-parsers.mjs` — this naming mismatch will cause that task to fail.
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:100 — `writeGateArtifacts()` called without try/catch in `runGateInline`; `cmdGate` has error recovery for the same path. Parity gap — add to backlog.

🟡 test/worktree.test.mjs:220 — All 8 `runGateInline` tests pass `null` for taskId, so the artifact-writing branch (run.mjs:92-112) is never exercised. Add one test with a real taskId to verify handshake.json and validator-findings.json are written to disk.

🟡 bin/lib/gate.mjs:286 — The `internalError` catch block was added to fix the previous round's SyntaxError but has no direct test. Consider a test that mocks an internal throw to verify the `internalError` JSON output.
🔴 `test/parsers.test.mjs:4` — `isUnsafeTaskId` and `buildConfigOverride` are imported but never called in any test case. Dead code; remove from import.
🟡 `test/parsers.test.mjs:792+1392` — `setupGateFeature` and `setupFeature` are near-identical 14-line functions. Extract a shared factory.
